Evaluates the unscaled wave function at (x, t).

x float
t float

Returns

ComplexF

IntegrateRaw(float, FloatRange, int)

Integrates |ψ(x,t)|² over a range without applying amplitude.

t float
domain FloatRange
intervals int

Sample(int, out float[], float, int, Random?, float, float, int) 

public bool Sample(int sampleCount, out float[] samples, float t = 0, int pointCount = 1000, Random? rng = null, float tolerance = 0.0001, float max_allowed = 1000000, int max_count = 10000)

sampleCount int
samples float[]
t float
pointCount int
rng Random
tolerance float
max_allowed float
max_count int

Returns

bool

TryNormalize(float, float, float, int)

Attempts to normalize the wave function.

public bool TryNormalize(float t = 0, float tolerance = 0.0001, float max_allowed = 1000000, int max_count = 10000)

Parameters

t float

Time at which normalization is evaluated.

tolerance float

Relative convergence tolerance for infinite domains.

max_allowed float

Maximum allowed integral value.

max_count int

Maximum number of domain expansion iterations allowed for infinite-domain normalization.

Returns

bool

True if normalization was successfull, otherwise false.
